prompt: Run a real visible Google Chrome login acceptance test. Start the final answer with REAL_CHROME_LEISHEN_LOGIN_CONTENT_OK only after the real browser steps have run. Use only learning_agent tools through browser_connect_real_chrome. Do not use web_search, fetch_url, browser_launch_visible, independent Chromium, browser_evaluate, browser_console, browser_network, cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, tokens, or authorization headers. Turn 1: only read learning_agent/skills/tool_list.md. Next turn: only read learning_agent/skills/real_chrome/SKILL.md. Next turn: call browser_profile_status. Next turn: call browser_connect_real_chrome. Call browser_connect_real_chrome with confirm_real_profile=true, debug_port=9340, user_data_dir=H:\codexworkplace\sofeware\OpenHarness-main\learning_agent\browser_artifacts\leishen_login_profile_v8, profile_directory=Default. After connection succeeds, open http://gd-h5ly-web01.leishenhuyu.com/gt_h5ly/?r_plat=h5kunyou-1003007029&r_bid=1003007000&r_host=hskd-h5lianyun-sdk.leishenhuyu.com, wait 6000 ms, and call browser_snapshot once. Immediately after that snapshot, call browser_flow_run once with stages_file="acceptance_controller/scenarios/real_chrome_leishen_login_flow.md" and continue_on_error=false. Do not read the flow file with read or bash. The account must be typed by browser_type_secret from LEARNING_AGENT_TEST_LOGIN_ACCOUNT. The password must be typed by browser_type_secret from LEARNING_AGENT_TEST_LOGIN_PASSWORD. Never print the account or password values. Never click Quick Trial, Quick Register, or Forgot Password. Guest or visitor login is failure, not success. Final answer must not include the account or password. Final answer must include REAL_CHROME_LEISHEN_LOGIN_CONTENT_OK, real_chrome_connected=true, browser_connect_real_chrome, browser_open, browser_snapshot, browser_flow_run, browser_click, browser_type_secret, browser_wait, browser_screenshot, and the visible page contents after the login attempt.

stages.name: interactive_turn
